Episodes.Title: Fight for Control
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mike Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stuart Hughes, Evan Sabba
Episodes.Plot: When a propeller departs the engine and causes major damage on Reeve Aleutian Airways flight 8, the experienced crew races to save the airplane and its passengers.

Episodes.Title: Fire in the Hold
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Janet Porter
Episodes.Plot: When mysterious cargo boxes ignite on ValuJet flight 592, they bring the whole plane down within a short time. The investigator struggle to find out what kind of cargo could possibly cause such fierce fire to bring a whole plane d...

Episodes.Title: Typhoon Takeoff
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Richard Tse, Jon De Leon
Episodes.Plot: The investigators wonder how an airliner in our modern world full of fail-safe features can crash on takeoff with nobody realizing that the pilots have made a horrible mistake.

Episodes.Title: Pushed to the Limit
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Doug Crosbie
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Robert Lee, Chris Murray
Episodes.Plot: When SilkAir flight 185 plunges 35,000 feet into the Musi River in Indonesia, the NTSB has a theory that the Indonesian authorities are not eager to accept.

Episodes.Title: Blind Landing
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Francisco Trujillo Avalos-Davidson, Michael Reventar
Episodes.Plot: Pilot arrogance and macho attitude were the official blame of the crash of TANS Perú flight 204 in severe weather.

Episodes.Title: Grand Canyon Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Richard O'Regan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, James Downing, Curtis Caravaggio
Episodes.Plot: A mid-air collision of two passenger planes over the Grand Canyon shocks 1956 America. Conclusions reached by investigators of this accident will change aviation forever.

Episodes.Title: Catastrophe at O'Hare
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Howard Hoover, William MacDonald
Episodes.Plot: When American Airlines flight 191 loses its engine and subsequently crashes into a hangar at Chicago O'Hare airport, the investigators shift the blame from a broken bolt to the airlines' unsafe cost-cutting measures.

Episodes.Title: Focused on Failure
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Bill Lake
Episodes.Plot: When everybody thinks that human error bringing down a modern airliner is no longer possible, the captain of UA173 proves them all wrong.

Episodes.Title: Locomotiv Hockey Team Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Edward Zinoviev
Episodes.Plot: Contrary to popular belief, the famous Russian hockey team was not killed by a drunken crew. But could just one of the officers on deck with a medical deficiency have caused this disaster? Investigators dig deep.

Episodes.Title: Death of the President
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Dmitry Chepovetsky
Episodes.Plot: The Polish political delegation, including the president, headed to Russia crashes during an approach to landing in Smolensk. Conspiracy theories fly rampant. But could it have been the politicians' self-importance that killed the...

Episodes.Title: Heading to Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Greg Beer, Bernard Vaillot
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Martin Roach, Emmanuel Kabongo
Episodes.Plot: Ethiopian flight 409's crash could not be attributed to any common reason, mechanical, weather-related or even terrorism. However, the most common and most overlooked reason is lurking in the shadows, quiet and deadly as always.

Episodes.Title: 28 Seconds to Survive
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Brian D. Young
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Alex Karzis, Rodrigo Fernandez-Stoll
Episodes.Plot: The ATR twin-turboprop aircraft flying 43 passengers on Santa Bárbara Airlines flight 518, a perfectly good aircraft crashed in the Venezuelan mountains. Series of pilot errors and arrogance are to blame for this preventable tragedy.

Episodes.Title: Air France 447: Vanished
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mike Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Russell Ferrier, Ray Galletti
Episodes.Plot: Air France flight 447 plunged into the Atlantic Ocean for no good reason. Could it be that the automation systems developed to save lives are the blinding cause of destroying lives in the wrong hands of inexperienced pilots?
